title: Shanghai
html:
Shanghai

Shanghai is the city Yahir used as his home base for the entire china chapter in mid-to-late 2024. He arrived through the shanghai study abroad pipeline (visa + ciee paperwork + mei dong handling correspondence, all logged in 2024 05 13 things alongside a packing list of 9 shorts, 12 underwear, 13 shirts) and stayed long enough that leaving in December 2024 felt like the close of a defining life chapter. The notes treat Shanghai less as a tourist itinerary than as the operational platform from which the rest of china got explored.

The everyday city

The recurring Shanghai itinerary across 2024 10 22 valeria visit and 2024 10 22 coffee shops in shanghai surfaces a consistent set of haunts: South Yunnan Road foodie street, peoples park marriage markets, AP Plaza fake market, yu yin tang for late-night music, the shanghai tower, 1933 Old Millfun (an art-deco picture spot), Hinichijou coffee, and go-karting. The coffee map specifically: OPS Coffee (pricier), Lucky Draw on Beijing West Rd (operated by Small Arms Big Heart), Blacksheep Espresso near IAPM on Maoming Rd, Greybox, Blue Bottle on Changan Lu near the river, the Yong Kang Lu road area, and a "Jonas Emil" entry whose status (person or shop) is still ambiguous.

Shanghai as launchpad

Most of the bucket list in 2024 09 05 shanghai sidequests is not local — Great Wall (Beijing), terracotta warriors (xi an), Tesla Gigafactory tour. Confirmed weekend campaigns: chengdu in September (2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu) and xi an in November (2024 11 07 xi an). The Valeria visit note adds hangzhou, river towns, and a "great walk" as day-trip ideas. Budget snippets in that same note ($118 hotel, $100 + $80 Beijing tickets) confirm the base-camp logic: keep a Shanghai apartment, rotate out, come back.

Where the comparative anthropology happened

Shanghai is where Yahir's pattern-matching against the U.S. happens in real time. 2024 08 31 determinants of advanced countries — the 16-question rubric for ranking how "advanced" a country actually feels — is almost certainly a delta-from-Shanghai exercise. 2024 09 02 notes on the chinese writes "they embrace exclusivity to a higher degree" from Shanghai, seeding the exclusivity as chinese trait concept. 2024 10 22 valeria visit even contains an intra industry trade homework question about Chinese imports/exports — osu coursework being completed remotely from a Shanghai apartment.

The farewell texture

2024 10 22 coffee shops in shanghai is the microcosm of Shanghai's emotional weight: a practical coffee-shop list that, by the late-2024 modification date, has had a farewell note added at the bottom — "Genuinely, thank you for everyone for coming. awesome dinner awesome night I seriously couldn't be more grateful for everybody. Great memory/night to wrap up Shanghai. Love you guys." This is the same farewell impulse that produces the longer-form 2024 12 14 departing china reflection two months later, and the 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure manifesto written from Shanghai two weeks before departure.

Open questions

Was "Jonas Emil" a person or a coffee shop? Did the Shanghai Sharks game, the Lincoln Jazz Center visit, or the Tesla Gigafactory tour ever happen, or did they stay aspirational? And the curious gap: Shanghai itself doesn't show up in the 2024 08 14 travel occurrences story-bank — meaning Yahir's best lived Shanghai stories may still be unwritten.
